description: Cross-engine ground-truth counts for the golden DWG (staging/dwg_20260617_191504/input.dwg). The modelspace total (21747) is the truth-gate numerator asserted three ways (accoreconsole native modelspace_entities == native_full IR diagnostics.entity_count == len(entities)). by_type sums to total. Rich-section counts are the native_full IR's realized collection sizes. These are the values the smoke tests pin so a regression in the producer turns the suite red.
